race.description: Footts Swan Hill Demolition Group Mdn Plate
race.comment: Some might find it hard to go again on AQUA STORM (3) after he was beaten at short quotes in his only two runs in the debut campaign, but the lack of depth here means he'll go around favourite again. Has changed camps since the last start, joining Shane Jackson, who is renowned for his work with tried horses, and he's trialled up nicely in preparation for the return. MAGNUS MAXIMUS (7) looked good first-up, when beaten just half-a-length, and although unplaced last time he was only beaten 1-3/4 lengths so he can easily feature here. They look the two main hopes. ROUGHNUT (9) could be best of the rest now he's at peak fitness from a good draw on his home track. ANGLING FOR INFO (2) hasn't won, but places more often than not, and strikes the right race to do so again. MAG MAX (6) can improve here in a race much easier than his past two runs at Geelong and Seymour.
